---
title: "Command Reference"
subtitle: "Every Command, Flag, and Subcommand"
---

# Quick Lookup

| Command | What It Does |
|--------|---------------|
| `/new-project [topic]` | Full orchestrated pipeline |
| `/discover [interview|lit|data|ideate] [topic]` | Discovery workflow |
| `/strategize [strategy|pap] [topic]` | Study design or protocol planning |
| `/analyze [dataset or goal]` | End-to-end analysis |
| `/write [section]` | Draft manuscript sections |
| `/review [file or flag]` | Quality review and peer review |
| `/revise [report]` | Revision cycle |
| `/talk [mode] [format]` | Presentation workflow |
| `/submit [mode]` | Submission workflow |
| `/tools [subcommand]` | Utility commands |

# `/discover`

```
/discover interview [topic]
/discover lit [topic]
/discover data [question]
/discover ideate [topic]
```

# `/strategize`

```
/strategize [question]
/strategize strategy [question]
/strategize pap [spec-or-topic]
/strategize pap interactive
```

# `/analyze`

```
/analyze [dataset path or goal]
/analyze --dual r,python
```

# `/write`

```
/write intro
/write methods
/write strategy
/write results
/write discussion
/write conclusion
/write abstract
/write full
/write humanize [file]
```

# `/review`

```
/review paper/main.tex
/review scripts/R/analysis.R
/review --peer [journal]
/review --peer --r2 [journal]
/review --stress [journal]
/review --methods [file]
/review --proofread [file]
/review --code [file]
/review --reporting [consort|strobe|prisma|stard|tripod] [file]
/review --all [file]
```

# `/submit`

```
/submit target
/submit package
/submit audit
/submit final [journal]
```

# `/tools`

```
/tools commit [message]
/tools compile [file]
/tools validate-bib
/tools journal
/tools context
/tools deploy
/tools learn
/tools upgrade
```

# Notes

- `job-market` remains the compatibility label for the full-length talk format in `/talk`
- Use `/review --reporting` before `/submit final`
- Use `paper/` paths, not legacy uppercase `Paper/`
